# Ted Brine

> Software engineer from Great Britain building distributed software systems focused on infrastructure, real-time communication, and scalable web applications.

## About

Ted Brine is a software engineer based in Great Britain. His work centres on distributed systems, backend infrastructure, real-time communication, and scalable web applications. This site is his personal portfolio and primary contact point.

## Expertise

- Distributed software systems
- Infrastructure engineering
- Real-time communication
- Scalable web applications
- Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js
- PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Cloudflare

## Links

- Homepage: https://ted.ac
- PGP public key: https://ted.ac/pgp
- Services and terms: https://ted.ac/services
- X: https://x.com/tedbrine
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/tedbrine
- Calendar: https://els.cal.com/ted

## Contact

Use the contact form on https://ted.ac or book a meeting via the calendar link above.
